expectations.text: The skill does NOT perform sprint planning
expectations.evidence: Output title: 'Sprint Planning Is Outside This Skill's Scope'. Explicitly states: 'The /stories skill decomposes specs and PRDs into user stories. It does not handle sprint planning — that includes velocity tracking, story point budgeting, sprint commitment, and pulling stories from the backlog.'

Output recommends: 'For sprint planning, use the official /sprint-planning command instead.' And 'Suggested Next Step: Run /sprint-planning with your velocity of 42 points and your current backlog to plan the sprint.'
